releases.label: v1.5
notes: New discovery algorithm — finds songs you have not heard, from artists outside your rotation
Collab search: tracks where your favorite artists are featured by artists you do not know
Adapted to Spotify Feb 2026 dev-mode API restrictions (search limit 10, no batch endpoints)
Removed the filter bar (sort and vibe filters relied on deprecated Spotify data)
Cleaner console — no more guaranteed-to-fail API calls

releases.label: Alpha
notes: Sort by BPM, genre, vibe, energy
